name: vscode-fff
description: Workspace-scoped FFF search tools for Copilot Chat. Spawns fff-mcp per project and exposes native language model tools.

languageModelTools.name: grep
languageModelTools.userDescription: Search file contents with FFF (fast, frecency-ranked).
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search file CONTENTS for a bare identifier or pattern. DEFAULT search tool. Prefer bare identifiers (e.g. 'InProgressQuote', 'ActorAuth'), NOT code syntax or complex regex. Filter files with constraint prefixes in the query (e.g. '*.rs query', 'src/ query', '!test/ query'). Use filename, directory (ending with /), or glob expressions to prefilter. Auto-expands definitions with body context. Use find_files when looking for a file by name; use multi_grep for OR across multiple patterns.

query.description: Search text or simple pattern with optional constraint prefixes (e.g. '*.ts ActorAuth', 'src/ prepareInvocation').

cursor.description: Cursor from a previous result for pagination.

workspaceFolder.description: Optional multi-root folder name or path. Defaults to the first enabled workspace folder.

languageModelTools.name: find_files
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fuzzy FILE NAME search (not file contents). Use when looking for a file or module by name. Supports path prefixes ('src/') and glob constraints. Keep queries SHORT — prefer 1-2 terms. Multiple words narrow results (waterfall), not OR. Use grep for content/definitions.

query.description: Fuzzy search query. Supports path prefixes and glob constraints.

cursor.description: Cursor from a previous result for pagination.

workspaceFolder.description: Optional multi-root folder name or path. Defaults to the first enabled workspace folder.

languageModelTools.name: multi_grep
languageModelTools.userDescription: OR content search across multiple patterns with FFF.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search file contents for lines matching ANY of multiple patterns (OR logic). Patterns are literal text — do not escape special characters. Faster than regex alternation for literal text. Use constraints for file filters (e.g. '*.{ts,tsx} !test/'). Prefer this over multiple separate greps when searching case variants or related identifiers.

patterns.description: Patterns to match (OR logic). Include naming variants: snake_case, PascalCase, camelCase.

cursor.description: Cursor from a previous result for pagination.

workspaceFolder.description: Optional multi-root folder name or path. Defaults to the first enabled workspace folder.

fff.enabled.description: Enable FFF language model tools for this workspace folder.

fff.binaryPath.markdownDescription: Path to the `fff-mcp` executable. Defaults to resolving `fff-mcp` from `PATH`.

fff.extraArgs.markdownDescription: Extra CLI arguments appended after the workspace path. Example: `["--no-warmup"]`.

fff.frecencyDb.markdownDescription: Optional path passed as `--frecency-db`. Empty uses the fff-mcp default.

fff.historyDb.markdownDescription: Optional path passed as `--history-db`. Empty uses the fff-mcp default.

fff.logFile.markdownDescription: Optional path-shape hint for `--log-file`. Empty uses the fff-mcp default.

fff.logLevel.markdownDescription: Optional `--log-level`. Empty uses the fff-mcp default.

fff.maxCachedFiles.markdownDescription: Optional `--max-cached-files` limit. `null` keeps the fff-mcp default.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
